title: Baby Mob Paintings
description: Adds paintings of children from update 26.1
body:
# 🎨 Baby Mob Paintings

The mod adds paintings of baby mobs from Minecraft version 26.1.

## 📜 Available Paintings

| Painting | Size | Author |
|----------|------|--------|
| Baby Chicken | 4×4 | RawMaw |

### Baby Chicken
![Baby Chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e1019fd4d555027be8ded05c5c9fd6f66d7b922.png)

*A cute baby chicken in the Nether*

## 🔧 How to Get Specific Painting

**Via Command:**
/give @p minecraft:painting{EntityTag:{variant:"babymobpaintings:baby_chicken"}} 1

**In Survival:**
Place paintings on a 4×4 wall until you get the one you want!

## 📦 Supported Versions

Forge, NeoForge, Fabric

## 🚀 More paintings coming soon!

---

*Made with ❤️ by RawMaw & ringoway*
